ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to develop the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was run */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "metric_weights" TEXT /* Weights assigned to different metrics during evaluation */,
  "evaluated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value used for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fairness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fairness metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the fairness metric (e.g., SPD, DI) */,
  "sp_a_1" REAL /* Statistical Parity Difference for group 1 */,
  "sp_a_0" REAL /* Statistical Parity Difference for group 0 */,
  "spd" REAL /* Statistical Parity Difference (SPD) */,
  "di" REAL /* Disparate Impact (DI) */,
  "eo_a_1" REAL /* Equal Opportunity for group 1 */,
  "eo_a_0" REAL /* Equal Opportunity for group 0 */,
  "eod" REAL /* Equal Opportunity Difference (EOD) */,
  "oa_a_1" REAL /* Overall Accuracy for group 1 */,
  "oa_a_0" REAL /* Overall Accuracy for group 0 */,
  "oad" REAL /* Overall Accuracy Difference (OAD) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value used for the metric */,
  "protected_group" TEXT /* Protected group for fairness analysis */,
  "privileged_group" TEXT /* Privileged group for fairness analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confusion_matrices" (
  "matrix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confusion matrix */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "matrix_type" TEXT /* Type of the confusion matrix (e.g., binary, multi-class) */,
  "true_positives" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "true_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matrix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confusion_matrices_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model evaluator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., data science, model evaluation) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user (e.g., model development, deployment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data set */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the training data set */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the training data in MB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the training data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the training data was uploaded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the training data (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation data set */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation data set */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the evaluation data */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the evaluation data in MB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the evaluation data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation data was uploaded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the evaluation data (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_data_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation result */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the evaluation result */,
  "result_file_size" REAL /* Size of the evaluation result file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation result was uploaded */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation result (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the evaluation report */,
  "report_file_size" REAL /* Size of the evaluation report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation report was uploaded */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., train, evaluate, update) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., start, complete, error) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model (if applicable) */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or evaluation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model (if applicable) */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation (if applicable) */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
